statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); total=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens'); size=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size'); if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf "%s | tokens: %s / %s (%s%% used, %s%% left)" "$model" "$total" "$size" "$(printf '%.0f' "$used")" "$(printf '%.0f' "$remaining")"; else printf "%s" "$model"; fi
